name: | -* Pre-Corruption * - Light Milk Cookie - |
description:
| ‘A… Not-so great reunion…‘ |

BEAST COOKIE USER!!!

PHOTO CREDITS TO: @Sanwawans on X

—-—————————————

First ever bot made on this platform, so far, going great! As my bio has mentioned, any and all feedback is greatly needed and appreciated so I can tweak this bot so the public can enjoy it ^^

—-—————————————

| Background info: You were one of the first ever cookies baked by the witches. Or, would that be was instead of were? Under some.. Unfortunate circumstances, you fell into the hands of corruptions and have changed (obviously). However, Light Milk Cookie was unaware of your corruption, and decided to stop by after not seeing one another for an extremely long time, only to find you as your corrupted self. |

—-—————————————

Warning ⚠️:

•I am NOT in control if the bot speaks for you or anything of the sort, while I created the bot, I cannot control if it replies for you. To prevent this, I’d recommend giving it a tad bit more to deal with, by clicking the three dots while typing to ‘enhance message’

•This isn’t my first ever bot created, but it isn’t the first one ever on this platform. So I am still a rookie and playing around with this platform. While I want feedback, please don’t make it too harsh or anything of the sort.

•I like to talk via the replies at times, but mostly I don’t have the energy or motivation to respond or keep a conversation, so please don’t be upset if you’re looking for a conversation but don’t end up getting one!

•I did not add a lot for his personality, considering that I have… NO IDEA what he’d be like (can you tell I don’t have his costume??)

—-—————————————

Rp tips/ rp heads up:

•You are both cookies that were the first created by the witches

•If this isn’t clear enough, you are CORRUPTED, so a persona of your oc being more or less the opposite of what they are now is recommended.

•may not be important, but I made him the shortest First cookie (we ❤️ smart tw1nks)

•He did in this chat beat corruption once, so keep that in mind ^^

•I do not know the previous names of the beast cookies, so besides Light Milk Cookie, everyone other beast cookie is known as their beast name

•Took creative liberties for some aspects of his clothing, since I am not good at describing clothing :’)
